creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: Sigh.  Well, I can't generate patches until I know what the new FreeBSD_version value will be, so I will have to go ahead and commit and then deal with the fallout post-commit.  I'm really surprised that we added compat shims for 4 of the fields changed in kinfo_file but required patches for the other 2 fields.  For upstream maintainers I'll probably tell them to just drop their earlier patch entirely as it will never matter for any released version of FreeBSD once the API is restored.
